ipa: ňąeňź č ňąd íaňź ňąojaňź ňąuŇč ňąbuku
notes: 1sg 'eev'; past prefix 'jaa-'; 'ung' 'a' with velar [Ňč]; length pinned by the doubled vowels of the documentation orthography (cardoso_apics; humetserdanelis2002).
'n…Ē…Ēna' 'lady' shows the retroflex […≥] allophone of /n/ after a back vowel and long […Ēňź] (humetserdanelis2002).

ipa: ňąboňźs ňąta ňąfa…≠aňź ňąisti liŇč…°ňą čaňźj
notes: 2sg 'boos'; present 'ta-'; 'lingvaay' with etymological /v/ as approximant [ č] and homorganic /Ňč…°/ (humetserdanelis2002).
Unmarked negator 'nuku-'; dative 'parim' 1sg; retroflex […≠] allophone of /l/ after back vowel in 'falaa' (humetserdanelis2002).
1pl 'noos'; future 'lo-'; 'teem' 'have/be' with phonemic long vowel (cardoso_apics; humetserdanelis2002).
Proximal 'isti'; 'maal' 'bad' with long […Ďňź] and retroflex coda […≠] (humetserdanelis2002; smith1977).

ipa: ňąmi…≤a ňąmai ňąd íaňź ňą čiňź
notes: Genitive 'minha' with ‚ü®nh‚ü©=[…≤]; motion verb 'vii' 'come' with approximant [ č] and length (cardoso_apics; humetserdanelis2002).

ipa: ňąeňź č ňąnaňź ňąpapiaňź ňąisti liŇč…°ňą čaňźj
gloss_en: I do not speak this language.
notes: Marked negator 'naa' (habitual/irrealis) vs unmarked 'nuku-'; 'lingvaay' with [ č] and [Ňč…°] (cardoso_apics; humetserdanelis2002).

gloss_en: There is a hen in the house.
notes: Locative clitic '-untu' 'in'; 'galinha' with retroflex […≠] after back vowel and ‚ü®nh‚ü©=[…≤] (humetserdanelis2002).

ipa: ňątaňź…≥tu ňąd íeňźntis ňąnuku ňą čiňź
gloss_en: So many people did not come.
notes: 'taantu jeentis' 'many people'; retroflex […≥] in 'taantu' and ‚ü®j‚ü©=[d í] in 'jeentis' (humetserdanelis2002).

ipa: ňąeli ňąta ňąd íuntaňź ňąku ňąnoňźs
notes: Present 'ta-'; 'juntaa' 'meet' with ‚ü®j‚ü©=[d í] and homorganic /nt/; comitative 'ku' (cardoso_apics; humetserdanelis2002).

ipa: ňąoňźj ňąeňź č ňąd íaňź ňąa…≥daňź ňąpraja
gloss_en: Today I went to the beach.
notes: 'ooy' 'today'; motion 'andaa' 'go' with retroflex […≥] after back vowel; trilled [r] in 'praya' (humetserdanelis2002).
Attested homorganic clusters: 'liingu' [liňźŇč…°u] 'tongue' and 'onda' [o…≥da] 'wave' with retroflex […≥] (humetserdanelis2002).
Future 'lo-'; benefactive/dative 'parmi' 1sg; 'paam' 'bread' with long […Ďňź] (cardoso_apics; smith1977).
'inche' 'fill' with homorganic /nt É/ (humetserdanelis2002, pp. 4-5); gemination of /k/ after short stressed vowel in 'saaku' documented but not written (cardoso_apics).

gloss_en: The lady is sewing this cloth.
notes: 'kuza' 'sew'; retroflex […≥] in 'n…Ē…Ēna' and 'pano' after back vowels ‚ÄĒ substrate transfer (humetserdanelis2002).

ipa: ňąeňź č ňąd íaňź ňąlembraňź ňąboňźs
notes: 'lembraa' 'think/remember' with homorganic /mb/ and trilled [r] (humetserdanelis2002).
Negated existential 'nun teem'; ‚ü®nh‚ü©=[…≤] in 'minha' and 'dinheru' (cardoso_apics; humetserdanelis2002).

ipa: ňąnoňźs ňąd íaňź ňąojaňź ňąkaňźm ňąmaňź…≠
notes: 'kaam' 'ground' and 'maal' 'bad' both with phonemic long vowels and retroflex coda […≠] in 'maal' (humetserdanelis2002; smith1977).
Prohibitive negator 'numista-'; 'papiaa' 'speak' with final long […Ďňź] (cardoso_apics; humetserdanelis2002).
